name: frontend-design
description: Frontend design skill for bold, production-grade UI implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Bold frontend design skill for polished UI work.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that adds a frontend-design skill for distinctive, production-grade pages, components, and interfaces with strong visual direction.
defaultPrompt: Use frontend-design:frontend-design to design and build a landing page.
Use frontend-design:frontend-design to restyle this React component.
Use frontend-design:frontend-design to make this dashboard feel intentional.
